title: Core Components of the R Language
description: A visual breakdown of the fundamental building blocks and concepts one needs to understand to work effectively with R for data analytics.
elements: Data Structures (Vectors, Data Frames, Lists, Matrices, Arrays)
relationships: Variables store data held in Data Structures
Functions are applied to Data Structures to perform operations
Packages extend R's functionality by providing new Functions and Data Structures
The Working Directory is the default location for reading and writing files
